tasks.task_description: Search for Makerkit references in code and configs
Update environment variable prefixes if needed
Update any Makerkit URLs or links
Clean up any Makerkit-specific branding in marketing pages

description: Rebrand from Makerkit to Portal across the entire codebase
context: Found 492 Makerkit references across the codebase. Main areas: package names (@kit/), folder names (src/makerkit/), documentation, database comments, and UI text.
Updated all documentation files, database schema comments, marketing pages, and root package.json to rebrand from Makerkit to Portal
Updated all environment files to replace Makerkit branding with Portal branding including product name, site title, description, and email addresses
